description: Telegram is a cloud messaging platform with consumer apps, bots, and developer tools for building custom Telegram clients and business verification flows. It also provides website and app login capabilities tied to Telegram accounts.
summary: Telegram exposes three developer-facing API surfaces on telegram.org: the HTTP Telegram Bot API, the HTTP Telegram Gateway API, and the Telegram API/MTProto platform for custom clients; it also documents Telegram Login/OIDC credentials but not as a standalone API surface here.
